approaches.label: Fair value hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies a recognised asset or liability as an eligible hedged item, and specifically addresses foreign currency risk on intragroup monetary items in consolidated financial statements.

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 presents cash flow hedging as a distinct top-level hedge accounting model for foreign currency risk exposures, including items considered in consolidated financial statements.
